name: Youmuu's Ghostblade

passives.name: Haunt
passives.effects: Gain {{as|{{rd|20|10}} '''bonus''' movement speed}} while out-of-combat with enemy champions for 3 seconds.

active.name: Wraith Step
active.effects: Gain {{as|{{rd|20%|15%}} '''bonus''' movement speed}} and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for {{rd|6|4}} seconds.

effects_structured.raw: While out of combat with enemy champions for 3s, gain 20 bonus move speed (10 if ranged).
Active: Gain 20% bonus move speed (15% ranged) and Ghosted for 6s (4s ranged).

simpleDescription: Activate to greatly increase Move Speed

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Haunt grants flat movement speed only after remaining out of combat with enemy champions for 3 seconds.
Execution model: Wraith Step is a self-active that immediately grants movement-speed bonus and Ghosting for attack-type-specific durations.
Timing note: Wraith Step has a 45-second cooldown and no projectile/delayed resolution branch.
Wave 129 (2026-02-25): Backfilled explicit fixed-cooldown active execution timing metadata (`cast_windup_seconds`) for immediate self-cast Wraith Step behavior.
